title: Luffy Pushes Toward Hody
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #6. The core beat is luffy pushes toward hody.
scene: The scene follows luffy pushes toward hody, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How're you liking your freedom?! The walls of shell tower that prone- cited you for ten long years won't help you here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So which will it be?!! Will you die from blood loss as the life spurts forth from your wounds?! or will this mighty ship crush you first?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll give you one last chance right now, Shira- Hosh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say yes, and I'll save you from certain death!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: So marry Meeeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshiii!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm terribly sorry, decken-sama, but ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're just NOT MY - !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you think we're gonna let you marry Shira- Hoshi, you've got another thing coming !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii is our beloved sister!! You are not laying a single finger on her, decken !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mamboshi- Onilsama!! Ryuboshi- onilsama!! Hoe-sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hoeee Eell!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Bahohhh?! My Brothers- in-Laaaaaw!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Like hell we are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you interrupt just as Shirahoshii was about to give me her answer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAAAHHH!! MAMBOSH1- Onilsama, Ryluboshi- Onilsama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the people from down in the plaza... they were trying to save me, and...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shirahoshi!! Save the crying for later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: - A - Are you... angry...? Uwaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm not angry!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: According to our father... the Noah must absolutely not be harmed in any way-fa-so-la- ti-do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As such!! We must ensure that it returns to the ocean floor without colliding with anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here it comes!! Whoaaa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't good...!! at any rate, we need to keep our course away from any under- sea mountains or trenches!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't lead the ship into such places!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But then where should we run, mambo- shi-onisama ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must go up!!! There are too many dangerous obstacles here on the ocean floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's time we took care of that decken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You can't run from me, straw hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks for this! You really saved me!! Are you all right, though?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time to be worrying about my wounds....!! *pant*...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KIRISAME.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahhh hah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, take me to the deck of the ship where I can fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I want to beat up that hody and the other guy who throws stuff!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I left that tower with cry-hoshi, I promised I was going to protect her!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: We three brothers will become great warriors, just like our father ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as we promised you, we will protect Shirahoshii with our lives!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You promised to protect her? Well, so did we....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel deeply ashamed that a mere drug was enough to prevent us from standing up to that common thug!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you, straw hat... We owe you our deepest apologies. We should never have doubted you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about that! Just take me to the deck!

summary: Luffy Pushes Toward Hody. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
